name: Discord AI-powered question answering bot
description: Takes a user question, searches the web via Exa for relevant information, Claude AI synthesizes a comprehensive answer from the sources, then posts the answer to a Discord channel. Adapted from n8n's Discord AI-powered bot workflow.

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for web search

discordKey.description: Discord connection key for posting messages

question.description: The user question to research and answer

channelId.description: Discord channel ID to post the answer to

steps.name: Search the web for relevant sources via Exa
Compile search results into source text
Build Claude prompt for answer generation
Build Discord message with answer and sources
